seoTitle: ClickEle News & Updates | Product Releases & Events | LiTong Distributor
seoDescription: Latest news from ClickEle including new transformer releases, magnetic component updates, and industry events. Stay informed about power solutions.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest ClickEle product announcements?
faqs.answer: Latest ClickEle product announcements are available through: (1) This news page - regularly updated with new releases; (2) LiTong newsletter - subscribe for email updates; (3) Product pages - show latest releases; (4) Technical support - contact FAE for roadmap information. As an authorized distributor, LiTong receives advance notice of new products.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's newsletter and check this page regularly for updates.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about ClickEle events and webinars?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about ClickEle events through: (1) LiTong events page - upcoming webinars and seminars; (2) Email notifications - subscribe to event alerts; (3) Technical seminars - regional training on magnetics and power supply design; (4) Online webinars - virtual training sessions. LiTong hosts technical seminars featuring transformer design and EMI filtering topics.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to LiTong's event notifications for invitations to technical seminars.

articles.title: ClickEle Launches High-Power Transformer Series up to 10kW
articles.summary: New CL-PQ series power transformers offer power handling up to 10kW for industrial inverters, EV chargers, and server power supplies.
content: ClickEle has announced the release of its CL-PQ series high-power transformers, designed for demanding power conversion applications.
- Topologies: Flyback, forward, half-bridge, full-bridge, LLC resonant
Applications include server power supplies, EV onboard chargers, solar inverters, and industrial motor drives.

articles.title: ClickEle Introduces Nanocrystalline Common Mode Chokes
articles.summary: New CL-CMC series uses nanocrystalline cores to deliver 5-10x higher impedance than ferrite, enabling compact EMI filters for high-frequency applications.
content: ClickEle has launched the CL-CMC series nanocrystalline common mode chokes, providing superior EMI filtering performance in compact packages.
- Lower core loss at high frequency
Ideal for switching power supplies, motor drives, and renewable energy systems.

articles.title: ClickEle Automotive Magnetics Achieve AEC-Q200 Qualification
articles.summary: Complete automotive transformer and inductor portfolio qualified to AEC-Q200 Grade 1 for EV, ADAS, and body electronics applications.
content: ClickEle has announced AEC-Q200 qualification for its complete automotive magnetic component product line.
- Common mode chokes for EMI filtering

articles.title: ClickEle Introduces High-Current SMD Inductor Series
articles.summary: New CL-PI-HC series power inductors offer saturation currents up to 50A in compact SMD packages for high-current DC-DC applications.
content: ClickEle has launched the CL-PI-HC series high-current SMD power inductors for demanding DC-DC converter applications.

articles.title: LiTong Partners with ClickEle as Authorized Distributor
articles.summary: LiTong adds ClickEle magnetic components to product portfolio, providing local inventory and technical support for power transformer and inductor solutions.
content: LiTong is pleased to announce a distribution partnership with ClickEle Technology, adding power transformers, inductors, current transformers, and EMI filters to our product portfolio.
As an authorized ClickEle distributor, LiTong provides:
- Full product line: transformers, inductors, CTs, EMI filters
- Comprehensive technical support from power electronics FAEs
- Application engineering and design review services
This partnership enhances LiTong's power solutions offering and provides customers with cost-effective alternatives to international magnetic component brands.
